_meta.source: IEEE Registration Authority — MA-S (36-bit) OUI registry

_meta.note: Wi-Fi-side twin of bluetooth_ouis_ma_s.json. Both files hold the same MA-S payload (IEEE 36-bit sub-allocations) — twin paths exist for back-compat with the existing BLE / Wi-Fi consumers. Populate via `uv run python scripts/refresh_ouis.py`.
